description_long: This is an ornate, horizontally-oriented wall mirror with a highly decorative, baroque-style frame finished in a metallic bronze or antique gold color. The frame features elaborate scrollwork, floral motifs, and symmetrical embellishments, giving it a luxurious and classical appearance. Integrated into the frame on both the left and right sides are two small, curved arm sconces, each holding a round white bulb, suggesting the mirror also functions as a light fixture. The reflective surface is rectangular and appears to be set slightly recessed within the frame, with a dark, highly polished finish. The back of the mirror is flat and plain, indicating it is designed to be mounted flush against a wall. This mirror would serve as both a functional and decorative piece in upscale urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: A baroque-style, bronze-framed wall mirror with ornate scrollwork and integrated dual light sconces on each side. The mirror is rectangular and highly polished, set within an elaborate decorative frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate bronze frame, rectangular mirror surface, and two light sconces on each side.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the mirror and the protruding light sconces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, undecorated back of the mirror and the frame's silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the symmetrical placement of the sconces.
attribute_frame_design: Ornate, baroque-style frame with metallic bronze finish, elaborate scrollwork, and integrated dual light sconces on each side.
